rulings.Case Title: POODLES, INC., VS. ROGER C. KUHN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Good Faith Settlement Ccp Sections 877 And 877.6
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday Aug 7, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFF POODLES, INC., PATRICK & FRIENDS, INC., CBD PROPERTIES, LLC, JILL WILLIAMSON Notice Of Motion And Motion For Good Faith Settlement Ccp Sections 877 And 877.6 continued to September 13, 2018. Opposing party to file a supplemental brief, not to exceed 5 pages addressing arguments raised in Section A(1) of the Reply, specifically addressing cases and CCP/B&P sections cited therein. Brief to be filed and served no later than August 31, 2018. Plaintiff may file a supplemental response, not to exceed 3 pages no later than September 7, 2018. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JEFFERSON CHRISMAN VS. HOWARD LEE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendants And Cross-Complainants For Leave To File Second Amended Cross-Complaint To Assert Fraudulent Concealment, Intentional Misrepresentation, And Negligent Misrepresentation; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday Aug 7, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT MAY LEE, HOWARD LEE Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendants And Cross-Complainants For Leave To File Second Amended Cross-Complaint To Assert Fraudulent Concealment, Intentional Misrepresentation, And Negligent Misrepresentation; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof GRANTED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MCLAUGHLIN FAMILY ASSOCIATES, LP ET AL VS. MAXIMUS 620 OWNER, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday Aug 7, 2018 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT MCLAUGHLIN FAMILY ASSOCIATES, LP, EJC FOLSOM LLC DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend to allege in good faith facts (1) showing that placement of $1.5M into a separate escrow would result in an unjust and unconscionable loss if oral agreement is not enforced; and/or (2) allege facts showing that improvements were made in reliance on the Third Amendment between December 15, 2017 and January 2018 (as opposed to the pre-existing agreements); and/or (3) e-mails exchanged by counsel created a binding written agreement. All amendments to be in bold font. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTY STYER VS. DAVID JAH et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday Aug 7, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT DAVID JAH Motion To Vacate Judgment OFF CALENDAR. Proof of Service is not executed under the penalty of perjury. Notice is insufficient per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Motion fails to comply with CRC 3.1113. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTY STYER VS. DAVID JAH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Vacate Complaint Based On Fraud On The Court
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday Aug 7, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT DAVID JAH Motion To Vacate Complaint Based On Fraud On The Court OFF CALENDAR. Proof of Service is not executed under the penalty of perjury. Notice is insufficient per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Motion fails to comply with CRC 3.1113. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. HUY TRAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion; Points & Authorities In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgmnet
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 7, 2018, Line 5. DEFENDANT HUY TRAN'S MOTION To Vacate Default And Default Judgment. DENIED. Moving party fails to meet his burden under CCP 473(b). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GARY JIMENEZ ET AL VS. EUNICE REDONDO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment; And Recall Writ Of Possession; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 7, 2018, Line 7. DEFENDANT EUNICE REDONDO'S Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment; And Recall Writ Of Possession. OFF CALENDAR. No valid proof of service on file; delivery to the messenger is not sufficient. No courtesy copies provided in violation of SFRL 2.7B. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. WILLIE MATTHEWS JR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 7, 2018, Line 6. DEFENDANT WILLIE MATTHEWS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. GRANTED, subject to opposition. =(501/REQ)
